// Who I Am

About Me

I'm a Data Analyst based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, trained at 360DigiTMG with a solid foundation in Mathematics. I turn messy, raw datasets into clear business stories that stakeholders can actually act on.

My flagship project involved analyzing 1,12,128 electricity market records from the India Energy Exchange — uncovering how solar growth is reshaping power prices, discovering the duck curve pattern, and quantifying a full market flip from demand-short to supply-long over 3 years.

Before analytics, I spent 3 years in operations and sales at VEL High Tech and Bajaj Finserv — which means I don't just build dashboards, I understand what business teams actually need from data.

Energy Analytics Power BI Python · Pandas SQL BSc Mathematics Chennai · Open to Relocate

// What I've Built

Featured Projects

End-to-end analytics projects — from raw ingestion to executive dashboards. Click tabs to explore each view.

⚡
Add dashboard screenshots to folder
⚡
GitHub →
Power Trading Forecast Analysis
Industrial Project · 360DigiTMG
  • Analysed 1,12,128 electricity market records (Jan 2023–Mar 2026) from IEX with weather data from 9 stations across 14 locations.
  • Uncovered 27.8% MCP price decline (Rs.5,533 → Rs.3,993); identified 18,406 price spike events and 944 crash events.
  • Applied correlation analysis across 85 variables — Bhadla solar radiation showed strongest negative MCP correlation (−0.392).
  • Discovered duck curve — MCP dips at Hour 14 (solar peak), surges at Hour 20 (evening demand ramp).
  • Market flip: demand-short (−796 MW, 2023) to supply-long (+8,073 MW, 2025) via RE growth.
🔍 Key Finding
Solar energy growth is the single biggest driver of MCP price decline in India's Day-Ahead Market — a structural, not cyclical, shift confirmed by 3 years of data.
PythonSQLPower BIExcelIEX Data
🛒
GitHub →
Retail Sales End-to-End Analysis
Analytics Project
  • Transformed and cleansed 45,000+ raw sales records using Advanced Excel ETL, reducing null values by over 90%.
  • Executed 10+ SQL queries to extract category-wise revenue metrics across 5+ product categories.
  • Conducted EDA using Pandas, Matplotlib & Seaborn; uncovered seasonal demand patterns and customer behaviour.
  • Designed 2 Power BI dashboards covering revenue, sales, category, and payment method analysis.
  • Analysed Rs.51M+ revenue and 46K+ customer orders to surface top-performing business segments.
🔍 Key Finding
Electronics drove highest revenue per order, but Fashion had the highest order volume — a classic revenue vs. frequency trade-off that shaped category strategy.
PythonSQLPower BIExcel

Iran–Israel Geopolitical Conflict & Economic Impact Analysis
Multi-Source Analysis
  • Integrated data from 4+ sources — oil prices, gold prices, stock indices, and conflict records for unified analysis.
  • Analysed 200K+ total attacks, 237K+ casualties, 120K+ missiles, and 80K+ drones via SQL trend queries.
  • Applied Python correlation analysis to quantify escalation impact on Brent crude, gold, and stock indices.
  • Built 3-page Power BI dashboard: Overview, Military Analysis, and Weather Impact tabs for stakeholders.
🔍 Key Finding
Conflict escalation events showed measurable positive correlation with Brent crude and gold prices — but stock indices showed divergent regional responses depending on exposure.
PythonSQLPower BITableauExcel
